case_title: BRAYAN LEONEL MEJIA CASIANI VS. ALEXANDER MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50 (WAIVED) REMARKS: THE RESPONDENT WAS SERVED BY DEPUTY GUILLORY #2490 AT COUNTY JAIL #2, POD F. SERVED MAY-17-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ALEXANDER
DECLARATION TO RREQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL(SEE ATTACH) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEJIA CASIANI, BRAYAN LEONEL

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEJIA CASIANI, BRAYAN LEONEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-10-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BRYAN LEONEL MEJIA CASIANI IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WROTE A DECLARATION STATEING HE CANNOT ATTEND THIS HEARING AS HE HAS A SCHEDULED IMIGRATION MATTER. JPT ERIC GROVER GRANTED THE CONTINUANCE AND SET THIS MATTER FOR A DATE HE WOULD BE COVERING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2024 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO SEP-16-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BAYAN LEONEL MEJIA CASIANI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ALEXANDER PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SHOW LEGAL BASIS FOR/AS THE REPRESENTATIVE OF THE DECEDENT'S ESTATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,668.00 FILED BY MEJIA CASIANI, BRAYAN LEONEL AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2024 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2024 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JUL-23-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BRAYAN LEONEL MEJIA CASIANI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-16-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF BRYAN LEONEL MEJIA CASIANI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
